  1. com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types

Uses of Package
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types

Packages that use com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
Top-level algorithm drivers and reusable base classes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.continuous
Continuous-space EDA and NES/CMA-style drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.discrete
Discrete and binary EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.permutation
Permutation-focused EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.continuous
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.discrete
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.permutation
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.tree
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.tree
Tree/grammar-oriented algorithm drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous
Probabilistic models for continuous search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.continuous.plugins
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete
Probabilistic models for discrete/binary search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.plugins
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.token
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation
Probabilistic models for permutation spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.permutation.plugins
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems
Problem implementations and shared problem-level helpers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.continuous
Continuous benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto
Boolean-function and cryptography optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete
Discrete benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.grammar
Grammar-based symbolic regression/classification problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.multiobjective
Multi-objective benchmark suites.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.permutation
Permutation benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.continuous
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.discrete
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.grammar
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.mixed
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.mo
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.permutation
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.tree
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.tree
Structured tree benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.distance
Distance metrics between genotypes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar
Grammar-based representation infrastructure.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.encoding
Deterministic grammar decision-vector encoding utilities.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl
Representation implementations and validators.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.plugins.continuous
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.plugins.discrete
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.plugins.permutation
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.plugins.structured
 
  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
    Class
    Description
    BitString
    Fixed-length binary vector genotype.
    PermutationVector
    Permutation genotype containing each index exactly once.
    RealVector
    Real-valued vector genotype.

  • Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types used by com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl
    Class
    Description
    BitString
    Fixed-length binary vector genotype.
    CategoricalVector
    Categorical genotype where each position stores one symbol.
    IntVector
    Bounded integer vector genotype.
    MixedDiscreteVector
    Mixed discrete vector containing integer-encoded categorical attributes.
    MixedRealDiscreteVector
    Mixed representation with real and discrete sections.
    PermutationVector
    Permutation genotype containing each index exactly once.
    RealVector
    Real-valued vector genotype.
    VariableLengthVector
    Structured variable-length vector used as minimal non-fixed-length scaffold.
